name: ANCHOR (schema-agnostic CTI KG via hybrid ontology discovery)

paper.title: Schema-Agnostic Knowledge Graph Construction via Hybrid Ontology Discovery for Cyber Threat Intelligence

difficulty.rationale: search-and-navigate over a schema tree + SHACL-style structural validation + multi-schema support (UCO/STIX/MALOnt); deterministic mock, no GPU/finetuning
